about.block1.title: Who are we?
about.block1.desc: We are a team of professionals working with solar energy since 2016. In 2020 we decided to create our own photovoltaic installation company, Green Solar, with the vision of becoming one of the leading solar panel distributors throughout Spain.
about.block2.title: What do we do?
about.block2.desc: We offer clean energy that's affordable for our customers. At Green Solar we believe using solar panels is the best alternative when it comes to renewable, sustainable energy. That's why we work every day so more people can enjoy the benefits of solar energy.
about.block3.title: A sustainable option
about.block3.desc: Electricity generated from fossil fuels is currently responsible for 80% of carbon dioxide emissions. It's also expensive. At Green Solar we offer a safe, environmentally friendly alternative that, over time, means great savings for those who choose it.

testimonials.title: What do our customers say?
testimonials.card1.name: Laura G.
testimonials.card1.text: I'm delighted with my new photovoltaic solar pergola from Green Solar. It hasn't just turned my patio into a beautiful, functional space — I'm also saving on my electricity bills. The installation team was professional and friendly.
testimonials.card2.name: Juan M.
testimonials.card2.text: I decided to install a solar pergola at my restaurant and it's been an excellent investment. My customers enjoy the shade the pergola provides, while the solar panels generate clean energy to run the business. I'm very happy with the results!
testimonials.card3.name: Marta S.
testimonials.card3.text: Green Solar's photovoltaic solar pergola has exceeded my expectations. It's not only visually appealing, I've also noticed a significant reduction in my electricity costs. The Green Solar team was very professional and made sure the installation was quick and efficient.
testimonials.card4.name: Carlos R.
testimonials.card4.text: Green Solar's solar pergola has been an amazing addition to our home. Besides providing shade and protection from the elements, we're generating our own electricity and saving on our monthly costs. The Green Solar team was very attentive.
testimonials.card5.name: Ana P.
testimonials.card5.text: The installation of our photovoltaic solar pergola was flawless, and the Green Solar team was extremely professional and friendly. We now enjoy a beautiful, functional outdoor space, and we're doing our part for the environment by using solar energy. We're thrilled we chose Green Solar!

carga.banner.title: EV Charging
carga.intro: An EV charger connected to your solar installation lets you charge your car with clean energy generated on your own roof, reducing your electricity bill and your reliance on the grid. Whether you're looking for a home charging point or a business solution, at Green Solar we design the installation around your needs.
carga.advantages.title: Advantages of charging your EV with solar energy
carga.advantages.item1.text: By charging with energy generated by your own solar installation, you drastically cut the cost of every charge compared to charging from the grid.
carga.advantages.item2.text: Modern chargers automatically prioritize your solar surplus, charging your vehicle when you're producing the most clean energy.
carga.advantages.item3.text: We integrate the charging point directly into your existing installation or as part of a new project, with no complicated work involved.
carga.advantages.item4.text: Our chargers are compatible with the vast majority of electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles on the market.
carga.advantages.item5.text: Combining an electric car with solar energy is one of the most effective ways to reduce your day-to-day carbon footprint.
carga.feature1.title: How solar EV charging works
carga.feature1.desc: Your solar installation generates electricity during the day, which first covers your home's consumption. The surplus is automatically routed to your vehicle's charger, making the most of the energy you produce before drawing from the grid. If your installation has a battery, you can also charge your car at night using energy stored during the day.
carga.feature1.img_alt: EV charger installed at a home
carga.installations.title: Some of our EV charger installations
carga.install1.img_alt: EV charger installation in Pilar de la Horadada
carga.install2.img_alt: EV charger installation in Elche, Alicante
carga.install3.img_alt: EV charger installation in Calpe, Alicante
carga.install4.img_alt: EV charger installation in Finestrat, Alicante
carga.feature2.title: 22 kW three-phase charger
carga.feature2.desc: Ideal for homes with higher contracted power or for professional use. Charge your vehicle in a fraction of the time while making the most of your solar production.
carga.faq.title: Frequently asked questions about EV charging
carga.faq.q1: How long does it take to charge my electric vehicle?
carga.faq.a1: It depends on the charger's power and your vehicle's battery. A 7.4 kW charger usually charges an average EV in about 6-8 hours, while a 22 kW three-phase charger can cut that down to 2-3 hours.
carga.faq.q2: Is the charger compatible with my electric car?
carga.faq.a2: Yes, our chargers use the Type 2 connector, the European standard, compatible with the vast majority of electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles on the market.
carga.faq.q3: Do I need a solar installation to have a charger?
carga.faq.a3: It's not required, but combining both lets you charge your vehicle with energy you generate yourself, maximizing your savings. We also install chargers independently.
carga.faq.q4: How much does it cost to charge my car with solar energy versus the grid?
carga.faq.a4: The cost depends on your electricity rate and the size of your installation, but most of our customers see a notable reduction in cost per charge by using their own solar energy instead of the grid.
carga.faq.q5: What do I need to install a charger at home?
carga.faq.a5: We assess your electrical installation and contracted power to recommend the right charger, and we handle the entire installation and necessary paperwork.
carga.why.title: Why install an EV charger?
carga.why.item1.text: Charge your vehicle with energy generated by your own solar installation instead of paying the grid for it.
carga.why.item2.text: Forget gas stations and queues at public charging points. Charge your car comfortably from home.
carga.why.item3.text: Reduce your carbon footprint by combining electric mobility with 100% renewable energy.
carga.testimonials.title: What do our customers say?
carga.testimonials.card1.name: Diego F.
carga.testimonials.card1.text: I installed the charger along with my solar panels and the difference in my bill is noticeable. I charge the car every night with the energy left over from the day. The Green Solar team explained everything really well.
carga.testimonials.card2.name: Sara L.
carga.testimonials.card2.text: I didn't know you could combine an electric car with solar energy so easily. The installation was quick and now I charge my vehicle for almost free most days.
carga.testimonials.card3.name: Rubén T.
carga.testimonials.card3.text: I got the three-phase charger for the business and it's been a great decision. We charge the electric van in a couple of hours and the installation process was very professional.
carga.testimonials.card4.name: Isabel M.
carga.testimonials.card4.text: Green Solar advised us on the right power for our home and the result was exactly what we needed. Very happy with the service and speed.
bomba.banner.title: Heat Pump
bomba.intro: A heat pump connected to your solar installation lets you heat and cool your home and generate hot water with clean energy produced on your own roof, reducing your energy bill and your reliance on the grid. Whether for your home or your business, at Green Solar we design the installation around your needs.
bomba.advantages.title: Advantages of heating and cooling your home with solar energy
bomba.advantages.item1.text: By powering your heat pump with energy generated by your own solar installation, you drastically cut the cost of heating, cooling, and hot water compared to the grid.
bomba.advantages.item2.text: For every kWh consumed, a heat pump can generate up to 4-5 kWh of thermal energy, a far higher output than traditional heating systems.
bomba.advantages.item3.text: We integrate the heat pump directly into your existing solar installation or as part of a new project, with no complicated work involved.
bomba.advantages.item4.text: A single unit lets you heat, cool, and produce hot water all year round.
bomba.advantages.item5.text: Combining a heat pump with solar energy is one of the most effective ways to reduce your day-to-day carbon footprint.
bomba.feature1.title: How solar-powered heat pump climate control works
bomba.feature1.desc: Your solar installation generates electricity during the day, which first covers your home's consumption. The surplus is automatically routed to your heat pump, making the most of the energy you produce before drawing from the grid. If your installation has a battery, you can also heat or cool your home at night using energy stored during the day.
bomba.feature1.img_alt: Heat pump installed at a home
bomba.installations.title: Some of our heat pump installations
bomba.install1.img_alt: Heat pump installation in Pilar de la Horadada
bomba.install2.img_alt: Heat pump installation in Elche, Alicante
bomba.install3.img_alt: Heat pump installation in Calpe, Alicante
bomba.install4.img_alt: Heat pump installation in Finestrat, Alicante
bomba.feature2.title: 16 kW high-power heat pump
bomba.feature2.desc: Ideal for larger homes or professional use. Heat and cool your home in a fraction of the time while making the most of your solar production.
bomba.faq.title: Frequently asked questions about heat pumps
bomba.faq.q1: How much can I save with a heat pump?
bomba.faq.a1: It depends on the size of your home and your solar installation, but since a heat pump generates up to 4-5 kWh of thermal energy per kWh consumed, most of our customers see a notable reduction in their heating, cooling, and hot water bills.
bomba.faq.q2: Is the heat pump compatible with my current heating system?
bomba.faq.a2: Yes, in most cases we can integrate the heat pump with underfloor heating, radiators, or existing air ducts in your home.
bomba.faq.q3: Do I need a solar installation to have a heat pump?
bomba.faq.a3: It's not required, but combining both lets you heat and cool your home with energy you generate yourself, maximizing your savings. We also install heat pumps independently.
bomba.faq.q4: How much does it cost to heat and cool my home with solar energy versus the grid?
bomba.faq.a4: The cost depends on your electricity rate and the size of your installation, but most of our customers see a notable reduction in climate-control costs by using their own solar energy instead of the grid.
bomba.faq.q5: What do I need to install a heat pump at home?
bomba.faq.a5: We assess your home, your current heating system, and your electrical installation to recommend the right unit, and we handle the entire installation and necessary paperwork.
bomba.why.title: Why install a heat pump?
bomba.why.item1.text: Heat and cool your home with energy generated by your own solar installation instead of paying the grid for it.
bomba.why.item2.text: Heat in winter, cool in summer, and enjoy hot water with a single unit.
bomba.why.item3.text: Reduce your carbon footprint by combining efficient climate control with 100% renewable energy.
bomba.testimonials.title: What do our customers say?
bomba.testimonials.card1.name: Diego F.
bomba.testimonials.card1.text: I installed the heat pump along with my solar panels and the difference in my bill is noticeable. I heat and cool the whole house with the energy left over from the day. The Green Solar team explained everything really well.
bomba.testimonials.card2.name: Sara L.
bomba.testimonials.card2.text: I didn't know you could combine a heat pump with solar energy so easily. The installation was quick and now I heat and cool my home for almost free most days.
bomba.testimonials.card3.name: Rubén T.
bomba.testimonials.card3.text: I got the high-power heat pump for the business and it's been a great decision. We heat and cool the whole warehouse quickly and the installation process was very professional.
bomba.testimonials.card4.name: Isabel M.
bomba.testimonials.card4.text: Green Solar advised us on the right unit for our home and the result was exactly what we needed. Very happy with the service and speed.
pergola.banner.title: Solar Photovoltaic Pergola
pergola.intro: A solar photovoltaic pergola is more than a simple structure; it's the combination of innovation and aesthetics. These pergolas incorporate solar panels into their design, creating a clean, eco-friendly energy source that complements any outdoor setting. Whether you have a large backyard or a cozy terrace, a solar photovoltaic pergola adds an air of sophistication while contributing to sustainable energy production.
pergola.advantages.title: Advantages of a solar photovoltaic pergola
pergola.advantages.item1.text: Solar photovoltaic pergolas use solar panels to convert sunlight into electricity, reducing reliance on non-renewable energy sources.
pergola.advantages.item2.text: These pergolas come in a variety of designs, materials, and finishes, letting you choose a style that matches your outdoor space's décor.
pergola.advantages.item3.text: While generating electricity, pergolas also provide shade and protection from the sun, creating a comfortable space to relax.
pergola.advantages.item4.text: Integrating renewable energy solutions can increase your property's resale value.
pergola.advantages.item5.text: By generating clean energy, a solar photovoltaic pergola contributes to a greener environment, helping mitigate climate change.
pergola.examples.text: You can see examples of large solar photovoltaic pergolas, like the one at the
pergola.feature1.title: How solar photovoltaic pergolas work
pergola.feature1.desc: The technology behind a solar photovoltaic pergola is based on photovoltaic cells, which convert sunlight into electricity through a process known as the photovoltaic effect. These cells are integrated into the pergola's structure, capturing sunlight during the day and converting it into usable energy. Excess energy can be stored in batteries for use at night or on cloudy days, ensuring a continuous power supply.
pergola.installations.title: Some of our solar photovoltaic pergola installations
pergola.install1.img_alt: Solar pergola installation in Pilar de la Horadada
pergola.install2.img_alt: Solar pergola installation in Elche, Alicante
pergola.install3.img_alt: Solar pergola installation in Calpe, Alicante
pergola.install4.img_alt: Solar pergola installation in Finestrat, Alicante
pergola.feature2.title: 15-panel solar photovoltaic pergola
pergola.feature2.desc: Ideal for large estates. Make the most of your space while saving on your electricity bill
pergola.faq.title: Frequently asked questions about solar photovoltaic pergolas
pergola.faq.q1: How much electricity can a solar photovoltaic pergola generate?
pergola.faq.a1: Electricity generation depends on factors such as panel capacity, sunlight availability, and geographic location. On average, a pergola can generate enough electricity to power a large percentage of an average home's consumption.
pergola.faq.q2: Are solar photovoltaic pergolas suitable for all climates?
pergola.faq.a2: Yes, these pergolas can be customized to withstand various weather conditions. Snow load and wind resistance features can be incorporated for areas with challenging climates. That said, your solar photovoltaic pergola will always perform best in sunny, clear weather.
pergola.faq.q3: Can I sell excess energy back to the grid?
pergola.faq.a3: In many regions, it's possible to sell surplus energy back to the grid, further offsetting your electricity costs.
pergola.faq.q4: Does a solar photovoltaic pergola require a lot of maintenance?
pergola.faq.a4: In general, solar panels require little maintenance. Occasional cleaning and inspections ensure optimal performance.
pergola.faq.q5: Can I install a solar photovoltaic pergola myself?
pergola.faq.a5: We recommend hiring professionals for installation to ensure safety, proper wiring, and efficient energy production.
pergola.why.title: Why install solar pergolas?
pergola.why.item1.text: Solar pergolas harness the sun's energy to generate electricity cleanly and renewably
pergola.why.item2.text: A solar photovoltaic pergola doesn't just generate energy — it also offers practical and aesthetic benefits. You'll create a functional, enjoyable outdoor space you can use for a variety of activities
pergola.why.item3.text: Installing solar pergolas is an effective way to reduce your carbon footprint and help preserve the environment.

seo_datospersonales.title: Our Commitment to Personal Data Protection | Green Solar
seo.datospersonales.title: Commitment to the Protection of Personal Data | Green Solar
seo_datospersonales.description: Learn about Green Solar's commitment to personal data protection under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 2016/679 and Spanish data protection law.
seo_datospersonales.keywords: data protection, GDPR, Green Solar, privacy policy, personal data
seo_datospersonales.og_title: Our Commitment to Personal Data Protection | Green Solar
seo_datospersonales.og_description: Green Solar's commitment to personal data protection under the GDPR and Spanish law.
datospersonales.h1: COMMITMENT TO THE PROTECTION OF PERSONAL DATA
datospersonales.subtitle: OUR COMMITMENT TO THE PROTECTION OF PERSONAL DATA: “INFORMED PEOPLE, PROTECTED DATA”
datospersonales.p1: The Management / Governing Body of GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L. (hereinafter, the data controller) assumes the utmost responsibility and commitment to establishing, implementing, and maintaining this Data Protection Policy, ensuring the continuous improvement of the data controller with the aim of achieving excellence in compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) (OJEU L 119/1, 04-05-2016), as well as Spanish personal data protection legislation (the Organic Law, specific sectoral legislation, and its implementing regulations).
datospersonales.p2: GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L.'s Data Protection Policy is based on the principle of proactive responsibility, whereby the data controller is responsible for compliance with the regulatory and case-law framework governing this Policy, and is able to demonstrate this to the competent supervisory authorities.
datospersonales.p3: Accordingly, the data controller shall be governed by the following principles, which must serve all of its staff as a guide and frame of reference when processing personal data:
datospersonales.principle1.title: 1. Data protection by design:
datospersonales.principle1.text: The data controller shall implement, both at the time of determining the means of processing and at the time of the processing itself, appropriate technical and organizational measures, such as pseudonymization, designed to effectively apply data protection principles, such as data minimization, and to integrate the necessary safeguards into the processing.
datospersonales.principle2.title: 2. Data protection by default:
datospersonales.principle2.text: The data controller shall implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure that, by default, only personal data necessary for each specific purpose of the processing are processed.
datospersonales.principle3.title: 3. Data protection throughout the information lifecycle:
datospersonales.principle3.text: The measures that guarantee the protection of personal data shall apply throughout the entire lifecycle of the information.
datospersonales.principle4.title: 4. Lawfulness, fairness, and transparency:
datospersonales.principle4.text: Personal data shall be processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently in relation to the data subject.
datospersonales.principle5.title: 5. Purpose limitation
datospersonales.principle5.text: Personal data shall be collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes, and shall not be further processed in a manner incompatible with those purposes.
datospersonales.principle6.title: 6. Data minimization
datospersonales.principle6.text: Personal data shall be adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed.
datospersonales.principle7.title: 7. Accuracy:
datospersonales.principle7.text: Personal data shall be accurate and, where necessary, kept up to date; every reasonable step shall be taken to ensure that personal data that are inaccurate, having regard to the purposes for which they are processed, are erased or rectified without delay.
datospersonales.principle8.title: 8. Storage limitation:
datospersonales.principle8.text: Personal data shall be kept in a form that permits identification of data subjects for no longer than necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed.
datospersonales.principle9.title: 9. Integrity and confidentiality:
datospersonales.principle9.text: Personal data shall be processed in a manner that ensures appropriate security of personal data, including protection against unauthorized or unlawful processing and against accidental loss, destruction, or damage, using appropriate technical or organizational measures.
datospersonales.principle10.title: 10. Information and training
datospersonales.principle10.text: One of the keys to ensuring the protection of personal data is providing training and information to staff involved in its processing. Throughout the information lifecycle, all staff with access to the data will be appropriately trained and informed about their obligations regarding compliance with data protection regulations.
datospersonales.p4: GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L.'s Data Protection Policy is communicated to all of the data controller's staff and made available to all interested parties.
datospersonales.p5: Consequently, this Data Protection Policy involves all of the data controller's staff, who must be aware of it and embrace it as their own, with each member responsible for applying it and verifying the data protection rules applicable to their activity, as well as identifying and contributing any opportunities for improvement they deem appropriate with the aim of achieving excellence in compliance with it.
datospersonales.p6: This Policy will be reviewed by the Management / Governing Body of GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L. as many times as deemed necessary, in order to remain, at all times, aligned with current provisions on the protection of personal data.

contacto.gdpr.title: BASIC DATA PROTECTION INFORMATION
contacto.gdpr.row3.td: Your data will be used to handle your requests and provide you with our services.
contacto.gdpr.row4.td: We will only send you communications of interest to you with your prior authorization, which you can provide via the corresponding checkbox provided for that purpose.
contacto.gdpr.row5.td: We will only process your data with your prior consent, which you can provide via the corresponding checkbox provided for that purpose.
contacto.gdpr.row6.td: As a general rule, only duly authorized staff of our organization will have access to the information we request from you.
contacto.gdpr.row7.td: You have the right to know what information we hold about you, correct it, and delete it, as explained in the additional information available on our website.
contacto.gdpr.row8.td: More information in the "PRIVACY POLICY" section of our website.

cookies_policy.seo.title: Cookie Policy | Green Solar
cookies_policy.seo.description: Read Green Solar's Cookie Policy. Learn which cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can manage them.
cookies_policy.seo.keywords: cookie policy, Green Solar cookies, website cookies, privacy, data protection
cookies_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookies_policy.intro: Welcome to the COOKIE POLICY of the GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L. website, holder of Tax ID B06774053. Here we explain, in clear and simple language, everything you need to know so you can remain in control of your personal decisions regarding cookies.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.title: WHAT ARE COOKIES AND WHY DO WE USE THEM?
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p1: A cookie is a small information file that is stored on your computer, smartphone or tablet each time you visit our website.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p2: In principle, a cookie is harmless: it does not contain viruses, trojans, worms or any other malicious software that could damage your device. However, it does have some impact on your right to personal data protection, as it collects certain information about you (browsing habits, identity, preferences, etc.).
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p3: For this reason, in accordance with the applicable legislation (LSSI and current personal data protection regulations), the activation of certain types of cookies requires your prior consent.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p4: Before making your decision, we would like to provide you with some additional information that may help you make an informed choice:
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p5: 1. Cookies can be classified into different types depending on their purpose. Technical cookies are necessary for our website to function properly, do not require your consent, and are the only cookies enabled by default. The remaining cookies are used to improve our website, personalise it according to your preferences, or display advertising tailored to your searches, preferences and interests. You can accept all these cookies by clicking ACCEPT, reject them by clicking REJECT, or configure them by selecting COOKIE SETTINGS.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p6: 2. Some cookies belong to us (known as first-party cookies), while others belong to external companies that provide services for our website (known as third-party cookies, such as cookies from providers like Google). Some of these external providers may be located outside Spain.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p7: Globally, not all countries provide the same level of data protection, with some offering greater protection than others (for example, the European Union is considered a safe environment for your data). Our policy is to work only with trusted providers who, regardless of whether they are located within or outside the European Union, have adopted appropriate safeguards to protect your personal information. In the section 'WHAT TYPES OF COOKIES DO WE USE ON OUR WEBSITE?', you can consult the privacy and data protection policies of each external provider in order to make an informed decision about enabling or disabling their cookies.
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p8: 3. Finally, depending on how long they remain active, cookies can be divided into two categories:
cookies_policy.sections.what_are.p9: Session cookies: these expire automatically when you end your session on your computer, smartphone or tablet. They are generally used to retain the information required while providing a service on a single occasion. Persistent cookies: these remain stored on your computer, smartphone or tablet for a defined period of time, ranging from a few minutes to several years.
cookies_policy.sections.types.title: WHAT TYPES OF COOKIES MAY WE USE ON OUR WEBSITE?
cookies_policy.sections.technical.title: Technical Cookies:
cookies_policy.sections.technical.p1: Technical cookies are strictly necessary for our website to function correctly and allow you to browse it. For example, they enable us to identify you, provide access to restricted areas when necessary, or remember options or services you have already selected, such as your privacy preferences. These cookies are enabled by default and therefore do not require your consent.
cookies_policy.sections.technical.p2: You may block or be alerted about these cookies through your browser settings; however, blocking them may affect the proper functioning of certain features of our website.
cookies_policy.sections.analytics.title: Analytics Cookies:
cookies_policy.sections.analytics.p1: Analytics cookies allow us to study how users navigate our website (for example, which sections are visited most frequently, which services are used most often, and whether they function correctly).
cookies_policy.sections.analytics.p2: Using statistical information about website usage, we can improve both the website itself and the services we provide. These cookies are therefore not used for advertising purposes, but solely to improve the performance of our website and better adapt it to our users. By enabling them, you contribute to this continuous improvement.
cookies_policy.sections.analytics.p3: You may enable or disable these cookies using the corresponding option. They are disabled by default.
cookies_policy.sections.functionality.p1: Functionality cookies allow us to remember your preferences so we can personalise certain features and general options of our website each time you visit it (for example, the language in which information is displayed, your favourite sections, or your browser type).
cookies_policy.sections.functionality.p2: These cookies are not used for advertising purposes. By enabling them, you improve the website's functionality (for example, adapting it to your browser type) and its personalisation according to your preferences (for example, displaying information in the language you previously selected), making your browsing experience easier, more convenient and more user-friendly.
cookies_policy.sections.functionality.p3: You may enable or disable these cookies using the corresponding option. They are disabled by default.
cookies_policy.sections.advertising.p1: Advertising cookies allow us to manage the advertising spaces on our website based on criteria such as the content displayed or how frequently advertisements are shown.
cookies_policy.sections.advertising.p2: For example, if you have been shown the same advertisement several times on our website and have not shown any interest by clicking on it, it will no longer be displayed. In short, enabling these cookies makes the advertising you see more relevant, more varied and less repetitive.
cookies_policy.sections.advertising.p3: You may enable or disable these cookies using the corresponding option. They are disabled by default.
cookies_policy.sections.behavioural.p1: Behavioural advertising cookies allow us to gather information by observing your browsing habits and behaviour in order to display advertising content that better matches your interests and preferences.
cookies_policy.sections.behavioural.p2: To explain this simply, imagine your recent web searches were related to mystery novels. In that case, we might show you advertisements for mystery books.
cookies_policy.sections.behavioural.p3: Therefore, by enabling these cookies, the advertising displayed on our website will not be generic, but tailored specifically to your searches, preferences and interests.
cookies_policy.sections.behavioural.p4: You may enable or disable these cookies using the corresponding option. They are disabled by default.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.title: WHAT CAN YOU DO ABOUT COOKIES?
cookies_policy.sections.manage.p1: When you first visit our website, you will see a notice informing you that cookies may be of different types.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.p2: Technical cookies are necessary for our website to function and do not require your consent. They are the only cookies enabled by default. All other cookies are used to improve our website, personalise it according to your preferences, or display advertising tailored to your searches, preferences and interests. You can accept all cookies by clicking ACCEPT, reject them by clicking REJECT, or configure them by selecting COOKIE SETTINGS.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.p3: Please note that once you have enabled any type of cookie, you can disable it at any time simply by unchecking the corresponding option in the COOKIE SETTINGS section of our website. Enabling or disabling our own cookies is always straightforward.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.p4: You should also remember that, through your browser settings, you can block or receive alerts about cookies. However, blocking technical cookies may affect the proper functioning of some features of our website.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.p5: Finally, if you enable third-party cookies (from external companies providing services to our website) and later decide to disable them, you can do so either through your browser's cookie management tools or through the systems provided by those third-party providers.
cookies_policy.sections.manage.browser_l: To make things easier, below you will find links to cookie management instructions for the most commonly used web browsers:
Google Chrome for iPhone and iPad
privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Green Solar
privacy.intro.p1: Information in compliance with personal data protection regulations
privacy.intro.p2: In Europe and in Spain there are data protection rules designed to protect your personal information, which are mandatory for our company.
privacy.intro.p3: That's why it's very important to us that you fully understand what we're going to do with the personal data we ask you for.
privacy.intro.p4: We will be transparent and give you control over your data, using clear language and simple options that let you decide what we do with your personal information.
privacy.intro.p5: If, after reading this information, you still have any questions, please don't hesitate to ask us.
privacy.intro.p6: Thank you very much for your cooperation.
privacy.section1.li1: Company name: GREEN SOLAR POWER 2021 S.L.
privacy.section1.li3: Main activity: Sale and installation of solar panels.
privacy.section1.li4: Address: C/ Yuca, 15, 03191, Pinar de Campoverde (Alicante), Spain
privacy.section1.p1: We are at your disposal — please don't hesitate to contact us.
privacy.section2.h2: What will we use your data for?
privacy.section2.p1: Generally speaking, your personal data will be used to build a relationship with you and to provide you with our services. It may also be used for other purposes, such as sending you advertising or promoting our activities.
privacy.section3.h2: Why do we need to use your data?
privacy.section3.p1: Your personal data is necessary for us to build a relationship with you and provide our services. With this in mind, we will offer you a series of options that let you decide, clearly and simply, how your personal information is used.
privacy.section4.h2: Who will have access to the information we request?
privacy.section4.p1: As a general rule, only duly authorized staff of our company will have access to the information we request.
privacy.section4.p2: Likewise, third parties that need access to your personal information in order for us to provide our services may also have access to it. For example, our bank will know your data if payment for our services is made by card or bank transfer.
privacy.section4.p3: Similarly, public or private entities to which we are legally required to provide your personal data will have access to it. For example, tax law requires us to report certain information about financial transactions above a given amount to the Tax Agency.
privacy.section4.p4: If, beyond the cases described above, we ever need to disclose your personal information to other entities, we will always ask for your permission in advance, through clear options that let you decide.
privacy.section5.h2: How will we protect your data?
privacy.section5.p1: We will protect your data using effective security measures appropriate to the risks involved in the use of your information.
privacy.section5.p2: To this end, our company has approved a Data Protection Policy, and annual checks and audits are carried out to verify that your personal data remains secure at all times.
privacy.section6.h2: Will your data be sent to other countries?
privacy.section6.p1: Around the world, some countries offer strong protection for your data while others offer less. For example, the European Union is a safe environment for your data. Our policy is not to send your personal information to any country that isn't safe from a data protection standpoint.
privacy.section6.p2: If, in order to provide the service, it becomes essential to send your data to a country that is less secure than Spain, we will always ask for your permission beforehand and apply effective security measures to reduce the risks of sending your personal information abroad.
privacy.section7.h2: How long will we keep your data?
privacy.section7.p1: We will keep your data for as long as our relationship lasts and for as long as required by law. Once the applicable legal periods have ended, we will proceed to delete it securely and in an environmentally responsible way.
privacy.section8.h2: What are your data protection rights?
privacy.section8.p1: At any time you may contact us to find out what information we hold about you, correct it if it is inaccurate, and have it deleted once our relationship has ended, provided this is legally possible.
privacy.section8.p2: You also have the right to request that your information be transferred to another entity. This right is known as "portability" and can be useful in certain situations.
privacy.section8.p3: To exercise any of these rights, you must send a written request to our address, together with a photocopy of your ID, so that we can verify your identity.
privacy.section8.p4: Our offices have specific forms available for requesting these rights, and we offer our assistance in filling them out.
privacy.section8.p5: To learn more about your data protection rights, you can visit the website of the
privacy.section9.h2: Can you withdraw your consent if you change your mind later?
privacy.section9.p1: You may withdraw your consent regarding the use of your data at any time if you change your mind.
privacy.section9.p2: For example, if you were previously interested in receiving advertising about our products or services but no longer wish to receive it, you can let us know using the opt-out form available at our offices.
privacy.section10.h2: Where can you file a complaint?
privacy.section10.p1: If you believe your rights have not been respected by our company, you can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) through:
privacy.section10.li2: Postal address: Agencia Española de Protección de Datos, C/ Jorge Juan, 6, 28001 Madrid, Spain
privacy.section10.p2: Filing a complaint is free of charge and does not require the assistance of a lawyer or attorney.
privacy.section11.h2: Will we create profiles about you?
privacy.section11.p1: Our policy is not to create profiles of the users of our services. However, there may be situations where, for service-related, commercial, or other purposes, we need to create information profiles about you.
privacy.section11.p2: In such cases, we will apply effective security measures to protect your information at all times from unauthorized persons seeking to use it for their own benefit.
privacy.section12.h2: Will we use your data for other purposes?
privacy.section12.p1: Our policy is not to use your data for purposes other than those explained above. If we ever need to use your data for different activities, we will always ask for your permission beforehand through clear options that let you decide.

instalaciones_index.title: Installations | Green Solar
instalaciones_index.banner.title: Installations
instalaciones_index.unifamiliar.heading: Single-Family Home Installations
instalaciones_index.unifamiliar.autocons: With this type of installation you'll use the electricity your panels generate during the day, and at night you'll draw power from the grid. You only pay for the electricity you use from the grid, and no battery storage is required. Any energy your panels produce that you don't use is sent back to the grid, and you'll see a credit for that contribution on your electricity bill.
In this case, you'll be completely disconnected from the electrical grid. During the day, you'll use the electricity generated by your panels, and it will charge the batteries that power your home at night.
instalaciones_index.comunidad.heading: Residents' Association Installations
instalaciones_index.comunidad.zonas_comu: With this option, you can reduce community expenses. The energy generated by the solar panels is directed to the building's general consumption and is paid for equally by all residents.
instalaciones_index.comunidad.compartido: Each resident receives solar energy in their home during the day and uses conventional grid electricity at night. Everyone will notice their electricity bill drop thanks to the use of solar panels.
instalaciones_index.empresas.heading: Installations for Businesses
instalaciones_index.empresas.autoconsumo: With this type of installation you'll use the electricity your panels generate during the day, and at night you'll draw power from the grid. You only pay for the electricity you use from the grid, and no battery storage is required. Any energy your panels produce that you don't use is sent back to the grid, and you'll see a credit for that contribution on your electricity bill.

Electricity bills tend to be one of the biggest expenses for businesses, and demand for solar panels as the best savings alternative keeps growing over time. Moreover, as the sector with the highest energy consumption, we have a responsibility to reduce our environmental impact wherever possible.
alicante.title: Solar Panel Installations Alicante | Green Solar
alicante.banner.title: Solar Panel Installation Alicante
alicante.intro.heading: Cut your bills and help the environment
alicante.intro.p1: Are you looking for a way to cut your energy bills? To make a positive contribution to the environment? Installing solar panels in Alicante is the perfect solution. With growing concern about climate change, more and more people are looking for ways to generate their own renewable energy at home. Installing solar panels is one of the most effective ways to do it.
alicante.intro.p2: At Green Solar, we understand the importance of reducing your carbon footprint, as well as the goal of saving money on your energy bills. That's why we offer a wide range of solutions tailored to your home or business. We use the best equipment and materials available on the market. Our team is also made up of highly trained, experienced professionals, guaranteeing a high-quality installation and regular maintenance service so your system keeps running properly.
alicante.intro.p3: Our customers can also benefit from generating extra income by selling unused energy to traditional energy companies. With a solar panel system, you're not only helping protect the environment — you're also investing in your financial future.
alicante.beneficios.heading: Benefits of installing solar panels in Alicante
alicante.beneficios.intro: The benefits of installing solar panels are numerous, ranging from saving money on energy bills to energy independence. Here are some of the most important benefits of installing solar panels in Alicante:
alicante.beneficios.item1: 1. Save money on energy bills. This is one of the most obvious benefits of installing solar panels. By generating your own energy, you reduce your dependence on traditional energy companies. As the system pays for itself, you can save large amounts of money in the long run. Many energy companies also pay solar panel owners for the energy they generate and don't use, so you can generate extra income.
alicante.beneficios.item2: 2. Renewable energy with no greenhouse gas emissions. It doesn't contribute to climate change. Installing solar panels in your home or business is an effective way to reduce your carbon footprint and help build a more sustainable future.
alicante.beneficios.item3: 3. Increase your property's value. Installing solar panels can increase your property's value and improve its appeal on the market. Many buyers are looking for properties with sustainable features, and an installed solar energy system is a big advantage.
alicante.beneficios.item4: 4. Energy independence: By generating your own energy, you become less dependent on traditional energy companies and reduce the chance of power supply interruptions. In case of emergencies or natural disasters, having your own solar energy system can also be crucial for keeping your home or business running.
alicante.porque.heading: Why choose Green Solar for your solar panel installation in Alicante
alicante.porque.p1: When choosing a company for solar panel installation in Alicante, it's important to pick a reliable, experienced provider. Green Solar is an excellent choice for anyone looking for a sustainable, trustworthy solution for their energy needs.
alicante.porque.p2: Green Solar has a team of highly trained, experienced professionals. This means we guarantee a high-quality installation and outstanding customer service. Our technicians are certified and stay up to date with the latest technologies and trends in solar energy.
alicante.porque.p3: Green Solar also only uses the best equipment and materials available on the market, so we can guarantee maximum efficiency and durability for your solar system. We also offer 15-year warranties on solar panels and a regular maintenance service to keep your system running properly.
alicante.porque.p4: We're committed to providing a sustainable, eco-friendly service. We help reduce carbon footprints and promote a more sustainable future. We work with organizations and charity projects to help developing communities improve their access to renewable energy.
alicante.proceso.heading: Our installation process
alicante.proceso.p1: First, we carry out an assessment of your home or business to determine how much energy you need and the ideal system size and orientation for your property. Then, we create a custom design for your system, taking into account your property's unique features and energy needs.
alicante.proceso.p2: Once the design is approved, our team of professionals will install the solar panels on your roof or land. During installation, we make sure the panels are aligned correctly to maximize sunlight capture.
alicante.proceso.p3: After installation, we run a test to make sure the system is working properly. Once the system has been approved, we'll provide you with a user manual and a maintenance plan to help keep your system in top condition.
alicante.proceso.p4: At Green Solar, we make sure the installation process is as easy as possible for our customers. We handle everything, from assessment and design to installation and maintenance, so you don't have to worry about a thing — just enjoy the benefits of your new installation.
alicante.casos.heading: Our solar panel installations in Alicante
alicante.casos.text: At Green Solar, we're proud to have a wide range of success stories in solar panel installation in Alicante. Our customers have experienced significant savings on their energy bills and achieved greater energy independence. Some have also generated extra income by selling unused energy to traditional energy companies. Our customers are very satisfied with their systems and with our installation and maintenance services.
alicante.presupuesto.heading: Request your no-obligation quote
alicante.presupuesto.p1: Interested in reducing your carbon footprint and saving money on your energy bills? Request your no-obligation quote from Green Solar today! Our team of solar energy experts will be happy to help, whether it's a small installation for your home or a large project for your business. We have the experience and resources to provide you with a sustainable, efficient solution.
alicante.presupuesto.p2: Plus, our free quote comes with no obligation. Simply request your quote, check our prices, and decide whether you'd like to move forward with the installation. Don't miss the chance to save money and contribute to a more sustainable future.
